NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR DECREE RELEASING PROPERTY FROM MECHANIC'S LIEN (CC SECTIONS 3144-3154), PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER JOLISH LIMITED PARTNERSHIP HEARING SET FOR DEC-17-2004 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONER JOLISH LIMITED PARTNERSHIP MOTION FOR DECREE RELEASING PROPERTY FROM MECHANIC'S LIEN (CC SECTIONS 3144-3154), SUBMITTED ON DEC-17-2004 BY RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. PROPOSED ORDER SUBMITTED IN OPEN COURT BY PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; BELDON YEE #2647
ORDER DECREE RELEASING PROPERTY FROM MECHANIC'S LIEN CIVIL CODE SECTIONS.
